title: Kongnamul Japchae
description: Stir-fried glass noodles with vegetables, a popular Korean dish. Japchae is a classic Korean glass noodle stir-fry made from sweet potato starch noodles and a variety of vegetables.
instructions: Cook the noodles according to the package instructions and set aside.
In a large pan, heat the soy sauce and sugar over medium heat.
Add the soybean sprouts and cook for 2-3 minutes.
Add the kongnamul (if using) and cook for another minute.
Add the cooked noodles to the pan and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes.
Add the spinach and stir-fry until wilted.
Season with salt and pepper to taste.
Transfer to a serving platter and garnish with toasted sesame seeds (if desired).
